messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Is Plato really the one who wrote the Republic, or was it actually Socrates?

The Republic (理想國) is attributed to Plato, not Socrates. While Socrates appears as the central character and primary speaker in the dialogue, Socrates himself left no written works — he taught entirely through spoken conversation. Plato was his student and composed the dialogues, using Socrates as a literary and philosophical vehicle. Attributing the Republic directly to Socrates would be inaccurate.
